headline: Assessing KKR (KKR) Valuation After A Short-Term Rebound And Conflicting Earnings Signals
summary: Recent share performance snapshot KKR (KKR) has drawn attention after a strong month, with the stock up about 15%, even as the past 3 months show a decline of around 14% and a roughly 10% drop over the past year. See our latest analysis for KKR. The recent 1 month share price return of about 15% contrasts with a weaker year to date share price return of around 21% and a 1 year total shareholder return of roughly a 10% decline. This suggests that momentum has picked up only in the short term...
